name: TRANSENTERIX INC. DL-,001
summary: TransEnterix, Inc. is a medical device company that is digitizing the interface between the surgeon and the patient to improve minimally invasive surgery through a new category of surgery with increased capabilities. The company's Senhance Surgical System is a multi-port robotic surgery system that enables surgeons to perform minimally invasive surgery with haptic feedback and eye-tracking camera control. TransEnterix is headquartered in Research Triangle Park, North Carolina.
